examples: I had no intention of going into the whys and the wherefores of the situation.
Even successful bosses need to be queried about the whys and wherefores of their actions.
You are a man that has gone through it all, naturally you know the whys and wherefores of it.
Full details of the hows and whys will be presented at a forthcoming conference in Edinburgh.
So we began actively trying to investigate the whos, the whys, the hows of the whole case.
